  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table):

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2025-01-15

  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [SNOMED CT: 80248007](http://snomed.info/id/80248007) (Left breast structure)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)palpationsbefund
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Tastbarer Knoten OAQ links, ca. 2 cm, derb, verschieblich
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)hautveraenderungen
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Keine Hautveränderungen
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)mamillenbefund
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Mamille unauffällig, keine Sekretion
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)lymphknotenstatus

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Axilläre Lymphknoten beidseits klinisch unauffällig
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "QR-KlinUntersuchung-Fall1",
  "questionnaire" : "https://www.senologie.org/fhir/Questionnaire/senologie-klinische-untersuchung",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/Fall1-Patient-Erika-Neumann"
  },
  "authored" : "2025-01-15",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "untersuchung-datum",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueDate" : "2025-01-15"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "seitenlokalisation",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueCoding" : {
        "system" : "http://snomed.info/sct",
        "code" : "80248007",
        "display" : "Left breast structure"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "palpationsbefund",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Tastbarer Knoten OAQ links, ca. 2 cm, derb, verschieblich"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "hautveraenderungen",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Keine Hautveränderungen"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "mamillenbefund",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Mamille unauffällig, keine Sekretion"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "lymphknotenstatus",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Axilläre Lymphknoten beidseits klinisch unauffällig"
    }]
  }]
}

```
